drifts.title: Runner reports success when builds fail
drifts.plan_requirement: Gate 15 (validation) must fail if build fails
drifts.root_cause: Catch-all degradation masks real failures; require_validation defaults to False
drifts.required_fix: Remove blanket degradation. Only degrade stages with explicit optional semantics.

drifts.title: CLI forces template mode and skips runtime
drifts.plan_requirement: Default CLI run must allow production mode
drifts.root_cause: CLI written for prototype demo, not production
drifts.required_fix: Add all missing CLI flags. Default to skip_run=False, template_mode=False.

drifts.title: Generated examples missing required output files
drifts.plan_requirement: Each scenario must include Program.cs, .csproj, README.md, example.manifest.json, expected-output.json
drifts.root_cause: Generator written for minimum viable output

drifts.title: Generated .csproj uses inline package versions
drifts.plan_requirement: Projects must use Directory.Packages.props for central version management

drifts.title: Output validator ignores expected-output.json
drifts.plan_requirement: Output validation must read expected-output.json and check files, sizes, patterns

current_evidence.function: validate_output() — no file reading, no minBytes check

drifts.root_cause: Validator written for basic stdout checking only
drifts.required_fix: Add project_dir parameter. Read expected-output.json. Implement all checks.

drifts.title: Fixture registry registers directory paths as filenames
drifts.plan_requirement: Fixture registry must index real files with metadata

current_evidence.function: build_fixture_registry() — registers path strings as filenames

drifts.required_fix: Use GitHub Contents API to list actual files. Mark available=False on API failure.

drifts.title: Example miner registers paths but does not parse C# examples
drifts.plan_requirement: Miner must fetch .cs files, extract symbols, cross-check catalog

current_evidence.function: mine_examples() — registers paths only; extract_symbols_from_code() never called

drifts.root_cause: No GitHub API integration for file fetching
drifts.required_fix: Fetch .cs files. Call extract_symbols_from_code(). Cross-check catalog.

drifts.title: Scenario planner ignores missing fixtures

current_evidence.function: _build_scenario() — executes pass when fixtures not found

drifts.root_cause: Fixture blocking deferred and never implemented

drifts.title: LLM router uses localhost only
drifts.required_fix: Add env var overrides and API key configuration
drifts.verification_command: Set env vars and verify override behavior

drifts.title: example-reviewer command is guessed
drifts.plan_requirement: Reviewer integration must be proven and operational

current_evidence.function: run_example_reviewer() — command verified accurate but reviewer not installed

drifts.root_cause: Reviewer repo not cloned or configured locally
drifts.required_fix: Document gaps. Add env var config. Block publishing until operational.

drifts.title: Publisher does not check all required gates
drifts.plan_requirement: Publisher must verify all 5 gate passes before publishing

current_evidence.function: publish_examples() — only checks status string; _verify_evidence() checks 2 files

drifts.required_fix: Add gate_verdict parameter. Require all 5 passes. Expand evidence checks.

drifts.title: Package watcher does not resolve NuGet versions
drifts.plan_requirement: Monthly watcher must resolve latest version from NuGet API
drifts.required_fix: Call NuGet Registration API. Compare versions.

drifts.title: Experimental families active by default
drifts.plan_requirement: Only cells is active pilot. Experimental families skip default runs.

current_evidence.function: enabled: true, status: experimental in active directory

drifts.required_fix: Move to disabled/ or enforce --allow-experimental flag

drifts.title: No evidence promotion to durable paths
pytest-timeout not in dependencies
drifts.plan_requirement: pytest-timeout must be declared if CI uses --timeout
drifts.required_fix: Add pytest-timeout>=2.2 to optional dev dependencies

drifts.title: DllReflector build artifacts in working tree
drifts.plan_requirement: Build artifacts must not be committed

current_evidence.function: Local build artifacts, already gitignored, NOT git-tracked
